action: ADR + CLAUDE.md codifying append-only memory invariant per Ghosh 2026 (documenting existing practice)
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: c40 (dossier) + ideally c41/c42/c43 shipped (ADR cites shipped state). Documents the principle evolve-loop already enforces but doesn't formally articulate. Per Phase-1 exploration: docs/architecture/sequential-write-discipline.md + single-writer phase exclusions already protect us from the races Ghosh warns about. Scope (2 files, ~80 LoC): (1) docs/adr/0009-append-only-memory-discipline.md NEW ~50 LoC — codify: (a) .evolve/ledger.jsonl is append-only by design (SHA-chain extends only); (b) .evolve/state.json:carryoverTodos[] is written ONLY by reconcile-carryover-todos.sh POST-retrospective (sequential, never concurrent); (c) violations are integrity breaches caught by ledger SHA verification. Cite Ghosh as external validation. Reference: knowledge-base/research/self-correcting-pipelines-ghosh-2026.md. (2) CLAUDE.md MODIFY +30 LoC — add subsection 'Append-Only Memory Invariant' under Three-Tier Strictness Model; reference ADR 0009; explicitly forbid in-cycle reads of state.json mutations not yet retrospected. Citation: dossier section 'Adoption 4: Append-Only Memory Discipline'. ZERO code changes — pure stewardship artifact. Verification: ADR exists; CLAUDE.md grep for 'append-only' returns ≥1 hit; ledger SHA-verify continues to pass.
